observations.label: hackerone_alias_signup_login
observations.value: operator completed alias-based signup/login locally; no password, OTP, verification link, cookie, token, or raw email recorded

observations.label: generated_tines_workspace
observations.value: post-login owned workspace loaded in browser; exact tenant slug not promoted to global scope config

observations.label: stories_dashboard
observations.value: one onboarding story visible with dashboard filters/search/new story controls and help panels

observations.label: story_editor
observations.value: onboarding story visible with sample weather/email nodes; publish and execution-related controls were not used

observations.label: credentials
observations.value: no credentials; new/plus controls visible but not used

observations.label: resources
observations.value: no resources; new/plus controls visible but not used

observations.label: users_settings
observations.value: one tenant owner visible with invite/new controls; raw account identity omitted

observations.label: api_keys
observations.value: no API keys; new/plus controls visible but not used

observations.label: authentication_settings
observations.value: session timeout/recovery-code/SSO/user-provisioning controls visible; unlock/mutation controls not used

observations.label: workbench
observations.value: chat/workbench with templates/stories/MCP surfaces and many not-connected tool templates visible; no prompts or tools executed

positive_evidence: Alias-based signup/login gate completed and authenticated browser session persisted into the <program-redacted> app.
Owned workspace, dashboard, story editor, credentials/resources/API-key empty states, users/settings, authentication settings, and workbench surfaces were reachable via normal UI.
Credentials, resources, and API keys appeared empty in the newly created tenant.
Authentication/security setting changes appeared gated by unlock or explicit mutation controls; Hermes did not mutate them.
negative_controls: No story publish/run/play or workflow execution was performed.
No credentials, resources, API keys, integrations, webhooks, callbacks, or users were created.
No Workbench chat prompt, AI tool execution, MCP connection, or integration connection was used.
No raw HTTP probing was performed against the generated workspace subdomain because it is not mirrored into config/scope.txt.
No non-owned data, cross-tenant tests, report submission, password/OTP/cookie/token/API key storage, or raw email retention occurred.
redactions: Raw account name/email omitted from markdown and JSON evidence.
Verification link, OTP, password, cookies, tokens, and API-key material were not requested or stored.
Temporary noVNC screenshots with possible account identifiers were moved out of handoff/ into ignored local storage; promoted markdown/JSON evidence remains redacted.
next_learning_seed: Close <program-redacted> first owned-account lane as no_finding/surface_only; any later lane should be separately planned around read-only profile review, API policy review, or second-owned-account controls without workflow execution or integrations.
